creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194116
py-django-babel-0.6.2.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-babel to 0.6.2.

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/python-babel/django-babel/compare/0.5.1...0.6.2

Changes to the port:
- changed RUN_DEPENDS to use Django v1.11 instead of Django v1.8
- sorted variables a bit
- added DOCS option with the appropriate dependencies

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
